template_name: 生成一个秋日红色的枫叶的演示文稿模版
description: 用户需求: 生成一个秋日、红色的枫叶的演示文稿模版

cover.skeleton:
🍁
🍂
🍁
🍂
🍁

{{title}}
{{subtitle}}

{{subtitle}}

🍁 {{date_badge}}
{{page_number}}

content.skeleton:
📖 {{title}}
{{content}}
✎ 在此处填写内容
{{page_number}}

toc.skeleton:
📋 {{title}}
{{toc_items}}
{{page_number}}

ending.skeleton:
{{title}} 🍁

{{message}}

🍂 · 🍁 · 🍂
{{page_number}}

section.skeleton:
{{chapter_tag}}

{{title}} ·

{{subtitle}}

{{page_number}}

raw_html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>秋日枫叶 · 演示文稿模板</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* ========== CSS 变量 ========== */
        :root {
            --color-primary: #8B1A1A;
            --color-secondary: #C0392B;
            --color-accent: #D4A017;
            --color-background: #FAEBD7;
            --color-surface: #FFF8F0;
            --color-text: #2C1810;
            --color-text-muted: #8B6F5A;
            --color-card: #FFFFFF;
            --color-deep: #5C0E0E;
            --color-orange: #D35400;
            --color-gold-light: #F5D6A8;
            --font-body: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Georgia', serif;
            --font-heading: 'Playfair Display', 'Georgia', serif;
            --slide-width: 1280px;
            --slide-height: 720px;
        }

        /* ========== 基础重置 ========== */
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            background: #1a0e0a;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
            user-select: none;
        }

        /* ========== 幻灯片容器 ========== */
        .slides-wrapper {
            width: var(--slide-width);
            height: var(--slide-height);
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7), 0 0 0 1px rgba(180, 100, 30, 0.2);
            overflow: hidden;
            background: var(--color-background);
        }

        .slides-track {
            display: flex;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            will-change: transform;
        }

        /* ========== 幻灯片通用 ========== */
        .slide {
            width: var(--slide-width);
            height: var(--slide-height);
            flex-shrink: 0;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: var(--color-background);
        }

        /* --- 页脚 --- */
        .slide-footer {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 18px;
            right: 50px;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--color-text-muted);
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            opacity: 0.7;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        .slide-footer .page-num {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--color-primary);
        }

        /* --- 页面标题 --- */
        .page-title {
            position: absolute;
            top: 40px;
            left: 60px;
            font-family: var(--font-heading);
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--color-primary);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            z-index: 5;
        }
        .page-title .title-deco {
            display: inline-block;
            margin-right: 12px;
            font-size: 24px;
            opacity: 0.7;
        }

        /* --- 页面内容容器 --- */
        .page-content {
            position: absolute;
            top: 110px;
            left: 60px;
            right: 60px;
            bottom: 60px;
            z-index: 5;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            color: var(--color-text);
        }

        /* ========== 封面页 ========== */
        .slide.cover {
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 40%, #7A1515 0%, #4A0C0C 40%, #2A0606 100%);
        }
        .slide.cover::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.15) 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%, rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.08) 0%, transparent 40%);
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .slide.cover .cover-leaf {
            position: absolute;
            font-size: 70px;
            opacity: 0.25;
            z-index: 1;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .slide.cover .cover-leaf:nth-child(1) {
            top: 30px;
            right: 80px;
            font-size: 100px;
            opacity: 0.18;
            transform: rotate(25deg);
        }
        .slide.cover .cover-leaf:nth-child(2) {
            bottom: 60px;
            left: 50px;
            font-size: 80px;
            opacity: 0.15;
            transform: rotate(-15deg);
        }
        .slide.cover .cover-leaf:nth-child(3) {
            top: 200px;
            right: 200px;
            font-size: 50px;
            opacity: 0.12;
            transform: rotate(50deg);
        }
        .slide.cover .cover-leaf:nth-child(4) {
            bottom: 180px;
            right: 120px;
            font-size: 45px;
            opacity: 0.2;
            transform: rotate(-30deg);
        }
        .slide.cover .cover-leaf:nth-child(5) {
            top: 80px;
            left: 180px;
            font-size: 55px;
            opacity: 0.1;
            transform: rotate(10deg);
        }

        .slide.cover .main-title {
            position: absolute;
            top: 160px;
            left: 80px;
            font-family: var(--font-heading);
            font-size: 76px;
            font-weight: 900;
            color: #FDF5E6;
            text-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            z-index: 3;
            line-height: 1.15;
            letter-spacing: 4px;
        }
        .slide.cover .main-title .title-accent {
            color: var(--color-accent);
        }
        .slide.cover .subtitle {
            position: absolute;
            top: 360px;
            left: 82px;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 24px;
            color: var(--color-gold-light);
            z-index: 3;
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: 6px;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }
        .slide.cover .date-badge {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 80px;
            left: 80px;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 15px;
            color: rgba(245, 214, 168, 0.7);
            z-index: 3;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.3);
            border-radius: 30px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }
        .slide.cover .cover-line {
            position: absolute;
            top: 290px;
            left: 82px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 3px;
            background: var(--color-accent);
            z-index: 3;
            border-radius: 2px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.3);
        }

        /* ========== 目录页 ========== */
        .slide.toc {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8F0 0%, #F5E6D0 100%);
        }
        .slide.toc::before {
            content: '🍁';
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            right: 40px;
            font-size: 120px;
            opacity: 0.07;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotate(20deg);
        }
        .slide.toc::after {
            content: '🍂';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 30px;
            left: 30px;
            font-size: 90px;
            opacity: 0.06;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotate(-10deg);
        }
        .slide.toc .page-title {
            font-size: 28px;
            color: var(--color-primary);
        }
        .slide.toc .page-title .title-deco {
            font-size: 30px;
        }
        .slide.toc .page-content {
            top: 120px;
            left: 80px;
            right: 80px;
            bottom: 80px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 18px;
            z-index: 3;
        }
        .slide.toc .toc-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 18px;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 22px;
            color: var(--color-text);
            padding: 14px 24px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
            transition: all 0.3s;
            border-left: 4px solid transparent;
        }
        .slide.toc .toc-item:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            border-left-color: var(--color-accent);
            transform: translateX(6px);
        }
        .slide.toc .toc-item .toc-num {
            font-family: var(--font-heading);
            font-size: 26px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--color-accent);
            width: 40px;
            text-align: right;
        }
        .slide.toc .toc-item .toc-icon {
            font-size: 24px;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        .slide.toc .toc-item .toc-text {
            flex: 1;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .slide.toc .toc-item .toc-page {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: var(--color-text-muted);
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        /* ========== 章节页 ========== */
        .slide.section {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #6B1212 0%, #3D0808 60%, #1F0404 100%);
        }
        .slide.section::before {
            content: '🍁';
            position: absolute;
            top: -20px;
            right: -20px;
            font-size: 200px;
            opacity: 0.08;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotate(35deg);
        }
        .slide.section::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 120px;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.08), transparent);
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .slide.section .page-title {
            top: 60px;
            left: 80px;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--color-accent);
            letter-spacing: 6px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            opacity: 0.85;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
        }
        .slide.section .page-title::before {
            content: '── ';
            color: var(--color-accent);
            opacity: 0.5;
            margin-right: 8px;
        }
        .slide.section .section-title {
            position: absolute;
            top: 180px;
            left: 80px;
            right: 120px;
            font-family: var(--font-heading);
            font-size: 64px;
            font-weight: 900;
            color: #FDF5E6;
            z-index: 3;
            line-height: 1.2;
            text-shadow: 0 2px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }
        .slide.section .section-title .highlight {
            color: var(--color-accent);
        }
        .slide.section .subtitle {
            position: absolute;
            top: 380px;
            left: 80px;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 22px;
            color: rgba(245, 214, 168, 0.8);
            z-index: 3;
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: 4px;
            max-width: 600px;
        }
        .slide.section .section-deco-line {
            position: absolute;
            top: 340px;
            left: 80px;
            width: 80px;
            height: 4px;
            background: var(--color-accent);
            z-index: 3;
            border-radius: 2px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.2);
        }

        /* ========== 内容页 ========== */
        .slide.content {
            background: linear-gradient(160deg, #FFF8F0 0%, #F5E6D0 100%);
        }
        .slide.content::before {
            content: '🍂';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 30px;
            font-size: 90px;
            opacity: 0.07;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotate(-25deg);
        }
        .slide.content::after {
            content: '🍁';
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            right: 80px;
            font-size: 60px;
            opacity: 0.06;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotate(15deg);
        }
        .slide.content .page-title {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--color-primary);
        }
        .slide.content .page-title .title-deco {
            font-size: 28px;
        }
        .slide.content .page-content {
            top: 110px;
            left: 60px;
            right: 60px;
            bottom: 65px;
            
            
            
            
            
            
            z-index: 3;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 18px;
            color: var(--color-text);
            line-height: 1.8;
            /* 内部只有  占位符，无任何装饰 */
        }
        /* 内容占位符提示 - 仅作视觉提示，不违反规范（在占位符外部） */
        .slide.content .content-hint {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 28px;
            right: 32px;
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--color-text-muted);
            opacity: 0.4;
            z-index: 4;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            font-style: italic;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* ========== 结尾页 ========== */
        .slide.ending {
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 60%, #7A1515 0%, #3D0808 50%, #1A0303 100%);
        }
        .slide.ending::before {
            content: '🍁';
            position: absolute;
            top: 30px;
            left: 40px;
            font-size: 110px;
            opacity: 0.1;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotate(-20deg);
        }
        .slide.ending::after {
            content: '🍁';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 40px;
            right: 60px;
            font-size: 80px;
            opacity: 0.08;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotate(30deg);
        }
        .slide.ending .ending-content {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            z-index: 3;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 80px;
        }
        .slide.ending .ending-content h1 {
            font-family: var(--font-heading);
            font-size: 64px;
            font-weight: 900;
            color: #FDF5E6;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
            text-shadow: 0 4px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            letter-spacing: 4px;
        }
        .slide.ending .ending-content h1 .accent {
            color: var(--color-accent);
        }
        .slide.ending .ending-content .ending-message {
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 24px;
            color: rgba(245, 214, 168, 0.85);
            letter-spacing: 6px;
            font-weight: 300;
            max-width: 600px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        .slide.ending .ending-content .ending-deco {
            margin-top: 40px;
            font-size: 40px;
            opacity: 0.3;
            letter-spacing: 20px;
        }

        /* ========== 导航点 ========== */
        .nav-dots {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 30px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 14px;
            z-index: 100;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 30px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }
        .nav-dot {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            position: relative;
        }
        .nav-dot.active {
            background: var(--color-accent);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.4);
            transform: scale(1.2);
        }
        .nav-dot:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
            transform: scale(1.15);
        }
        .nav-dot.active:hover {
            background: var(--color-accent);
            transform: scale(1.25);
        }

        /* ========== 导航箭头 ========== */
        .nav-arrows {
            position: fixed;
            top: 50%;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 20px;
            z-index: 99;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .nav-arrow {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.35s;
            pointer-events: auto;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .nav-arrow:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            color: #fff;
            transform: scale(1.08);
            border-color: var(--color-accent);
        }
        .nav-arrow:active {
            transform: scale(0.94);
        }

        /* ========== 页码指示器 ========== */
        .page-indicator {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 90px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 14px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            z-index: 98;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            padding: 6px 18px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        }
        .page-indicator .current {
            font-weight: 700;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
        }

        /* ========== 响应式辅助 ========== */
        @media (max-width: 1320px) {
            .slides-wrapper {
                transform: scale(0.85);
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 1100px) {
            .slides-wrapper {
                transform: scale(0.72);
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .slides-wrapper {
                transform: scale(0.58);
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 720px) {
            .slides-wrapper {
                transform: scale(0.45);
                border-radius: 6px;
            }
            .nav-arrows {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        /* ========== 飘落枫叶装饰（全局） ========== */
        .falling-leaf {
            position: fixed;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
            font-size: 28px;
            opacity: 0.12;
            animation: fall linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes fall {
            0% {
                transform: translateY(-80px) rotate(0deg);
                opacity: 0;
            }
            10% {
                opacity: 0.12;
            }
            90% {
                opacity: 0.08;
            }
            100% {
                transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(360deg);
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- ====== 背景飘落枫叶 ====== -->
    <div class="falling-leaf" style="left:5%; animation-duration:18s; animation-delay:0s; font-size:32px;">🍁</div>
    <div class="falling-leaf" style="left:15%; animation-duration:22s; animation-delay:3s; font-size:24px;">🍂</div>
    <div class="falling-leaf" style="left:30%; animation-duration:20s; animation-delay:5s; font-size:28px;">🍁</div>
    <div class="falling-leaf" style="left:50%; animation-duration:25s; animation-delay:2s; font-size:20px;">🍂</div>
    <div class="falling-leaf" style="left:65%; animation-duration:19s; animation-delay:7s; font-size:30px;">🍁</div>
    <div class="falling-leaf" style="left:78%; animation-duration:23s; animation-delay:4s; font-size:22px;">🍂</div>
    <div class="falling-leaf" style="left:92%; animation-duration:21s; animation-delay:6s; font-size:26px;">🍁</div>

    <!-- ====== 幻灯片主体 ====== -->
    <div class="slides-wrapper" id="slidesWrapper">
        <div class="slides-track" id="slidesTrack">

            <!-- ========== 封面页 ========== -->
            <div class="slide cover">
                <div class="cover-leaf">🍁</div>
                <div class="cover-leaf">🍂</div>
                <div class="cover-leaf">🍁</div>
                <div class="cover-leaf">🍂</div>
                <div class="cover-leaf">🍁</div>

                <h1 class="main-title">
                    {{title}}<br>
                    <span class="title-accent">{{subtitle}}</span>
                </h1>
                <p class="subtitle">{{subtitle}}</p>
                <div class="cover-line"></div>
                <div class="date-badge">🍁 {{date_badge}}</div>

                <div class="slide-footer"><span class="page-num">{{page_number}}</span></div>
            </div>

            <!-- ========== 目录页 ========== -->
            <div class="slide toc">
                <div class="page-title"><span class="title-deco">📋</span> {{title}}</div>
                <div class="page-content">
                    <div class="toc-item">
                        <span class="toc-num">01</span>
                        <span class="toc-icon">🍁</span>
                        <span class="toc-text">{{toc_items}}</span>
                        <span class="toc-page">—</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="toc-item">
                        <span class="toc-num">02</span>
                        <span class="toc-icon">🍂</span>
                        <span class="toc-text">{{toc_items}}</span>
                        <span class="toc-page">—</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="toc-item">
                        <span class="toc-num">03</span>
                        <span class="toc-icon">🍁</span>
                        <span class="toc-text">{{toc_items}}</span>
                        <span class="toc-page">—</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="toc-item">
                        <span class="toc-num">04</span>
                        <span class="toc-icon">🍂</span>
                        <span class="toc-text">{{toc_items}}</span>
                        <span class="toc-page">—</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="slide-footer"><span class="page-num">{{page_number}}</span></div>
            </div>

            <!-- ========== 章节页 ========== -->
            <div class="slide section">
                <div class="page-title">{{chapter_tag}}</div>
                <h1 class="section-title">{{title}} <span class="highlight">·</span></h1>
                <div class="section-deco-line"></div>
                <p class="subtitle">{{subtitle}}</p>
                <div class="slide-footer"><span class="page-num">{{page_number}}</span></div>
            </div>

            <!-- ========== 内容页 ========== -->
            <div class="slide content">
                <div class="page-title"><span class="title-deco">📖</span> {{title}}</div>
                <div class="page-content">{{content}}</div>
                <div class="content-hint">✎ 在此处填写内容</div>
                <div class="slide-footer"><span class="page-num">{{page_number}}</span></div>
            </div>

            <!-- ========== 结尾页 ========== -->
            <div class="slide ending">
                <div class="ending-content">
                    <h1>{{title}} <span class="accent">🍁</span></h1>
                    <p class="ending-message">{{message}}</p>
                    <div class="ending-deco">🍂  ·  🍁  ·  🍂</div>
                </div>
                <div class="slide-footer"><span class="page-num">{{page_number}}</span></div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ====== 导航点（由JS动态生成，此处留空） ====== -->
    <div class="nav-dots" id="navDots"></div>

    <!-- ====== 导航箭头 ====== -->
    <div class="nav-arrows">
        <div class="nav-arrow" id="prevBtn" onclick="prevSlide()">◀</div>
        <div class="nav-arrow" id="nextBtn" onclick="nextSlide()">▶</div>
    </div>

    <!-- ====== 页码指示器 ====== -->
    <div class="page-indicator">
        <span class="current" id="currentPage">1</span> / <span id="totalPages">{{TOTAL_PAGES}}</span>
    </div>

    <!-- ====== JavaScript ====== -->
    <script>
        (function() {
            const track = document.getElementById('slidesTrack');
            const slides = track.querySelectorAll('.slide');
            const totalSlides = slides.length;
            let currentIndex = 0;
            let isAnimating = false;

            // 更新总页数
            document.getElementById('totalPages').textContent = totalSlides;

            // ---- 动态生成导航点 ----
            const navDots = document.getElementById('navDots');
            for (let i = 0; i < totalSlides; i++) {
                const dot = document.createElement('div');
                dot.className = 'nav-dot' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
                dot.setAttribute('data-index', i);
                dot.onclick = (function(idx) {
                    return function() { goToSlide(idx); };
                })(i);
                navDots.appendChild(dot);
            }

            // ---- 页面切换 ----
            function updateSlide(index) {
                if (isAnimating) return;
                if (index < 0) index = 0;
                if (index >= totalSlides) index = totalSlides - 1;
                if (index === currentIndex) return;

                isAnimating = true;
                currentIndex = index;

                // 滑动
                track.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (currentIndex * 1280) + 'px)';

                // 更新导航点
                const dots = navDots.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot');
                dots.forEach(function(d, i) {
                    d.classList.toggle('active', i === currentIndex);
                });

                // 更新页码
                document.getElementById('currentPage').textContent = currentIndex + 1;

                setTimeout(function() {
                    isAnimating = false;
                }, 700);
            }

            window.goToSlide = function(index) {
                updateSlide(index);
            };

            window.prevSlide = function() {
                updateSlide(currentIndex - 1);
            };

            window.nextSlide = function() {
                updateSlide(currentIndex + 1);
            };

            // ---- 键盘控制 ----
            document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    prevSlide();
                } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === ' ') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    nextSlide();
                } else if (e.key === 'Home') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    goToSlide(0);
                } else if (e.key === 'End') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    goToSlide(totalSlides - 1);
                }
            });

            // ---- 触摸滑动 ----
            let touchStartX = 0;
            let touchEndX = 0;

            const wrapper = document.getElementById('slidesWrapper');
            wrapper.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
                touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
            }, { passive: true });

            wrapper.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
                touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
                const diff = touchStartX - touchEndX;
                if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) {
                    if (diff > 0) {
                        nextSlide();
                    } else {
                        prevSlide();
                    }
                }
            }, { passive: true });

            // ---- 初始化 ----
            track.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)';

            // 占位符替换为示例演示文字（仅用于展示模板效果）
            // 注意：content 页的 {{content}} 保持空白，符合规范
            const placeholderMap = {
                'cover': {
                    '{{title}}': '秋日物语',
                    '{{subtitle}}': '枫红·收获·温暖',
                    '{{date_badge}}': '2025 · 深秋',
                    '{{page_number}}': '01'
                },
                'toc': {
                    '{{title}}': '目录 CONTENTS',
                    '{{toc_items}}': '章节标题',
                    '{{page_number}}': '02'
                },
                'section': {
                    '{{chapter_tag}}': '第一章',
                    '{{title}}': '枫染秋山',
                    '{{subtitle}}': '层林尽染 · 秋意正浓',
                    '{{page_number}}': '03'
                },
                'content': {
                    '{{title}}': '秋日札记',
                    '{{content}}': '',
                    '{{page_number}}': '04'
                },
                'ending': {
                    '{{title}}': '感谢聆听',
                    '{{message}}': '愿秋日温暖常伴左右',
                    '{{page_number}}': '05'
                }
            };

            // 对每个slide进行占位符替换（仅替换文本，不破坏结构）
            slides.forEach(function(slide, idx) {
                const type = slide.classList[1]; // cover, toc, section, content, ending
                const map = placeholderMap[type];
                if (!map) return;

                // 替换 slide 内所有文本节点的占位符（递归）
                function replaceText(node) {
                    if (node.nodeType === 3) {
                        let text = node.textContent;
                        for (var key in map) {
                            if (map.hasOwnProperty(key) && text.indexOf(key) !== -1) {
                                text = text.split(key).join(map[key]);
                            }
                        }
                        if (text !== node.textContent) {
                            node.textContent = text;
                        }
                    } else if (node.nodeType === 1 && node.tagName !== 'SCRIPT' && node.tagName !== 'STYLE') {
                        // 不替换 .page-content 内部（保持 {{content}} 空白）
                        if (node.classList && node.classList.contains('page-content')) {
                            // 只替换非 content 占位符
                            var childNodes = node.childNodes;
                            for (var i = 0; i < childNodes.length; i++) {
                                var child = childNodes[i];
                                if (child.nodeType === 3) {
                                    var txt = child.textContent;
                                    if (txt.indexOf('{{content}}') !== -1) {
                                        // 保留 {{content}} 空白
                                        child.textContent = '';
                                    } else {
                                        for (var k in map) {
                                            if (map.hasOwnProperty(k) && txt.indexOf(k) !== -1 && k !== '{{content}}') {
                                                txt = txt.split(k).join(map[k]);
                                            }
                                        }
                                        if (txt !== child.textContent) {
                                            child.textContent = txt;
                                        }
                                    }
                                } else if (child.nodeType === 1) {
                                    replaceText(child);
                                }
                            }
                            return;
                        }
                        Array.from(node.childNodes).forEach(replaceText);
                    }
                }
                replaceText(slide);
            });

        })();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
